title: Berlin Last Day - Quick Summary
items: **Plan your Berlin last day backwards from departure time,** not forwards from a wish list of sights.
**Solve luggage first.** A rolling suitcase makes cobblestones, station stairs, cafes and final walks much harder.
**Choose one close final anchor:** Hauptbahnhof and the Spree, Hackescher Markt, Museum Island edges, Alexanderplatz, or City West depending on your departure route.
**For BER Airport, protect the airport phase.** Checked bags, non-Schengen flights, families and extra screening need more buffer than a simple hand-luggage Schengen flight.
**Do not rely on old BER Runway slot advice.** BER discontinued Runway security slot reservations after 26 May 2026.
**A calm final coffee or walk is better than one extra distant stop** followed by a stressed airport or train transfer.
